name: company-problem-review-plugin
description: A reusable Codex plugin template for solving a public, verifiable company problem with structured evidence review, risk flags, and human-review guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Turns public company-problem research into a structured review workflow with evidence checks and follow-up questions.
interface.longDescription: This plugin template helps teams build a Codex plugin for one selected company, using public and verifiable sources. It supports evidence inventory, missing-item detection, key-field comparison, risk flagging, and follow-up question drafting while keeping final business, legal, audit, or compliance judgments with the human reviewer.
capabilities: Risk flag output with source evidence
defaultPrompt: Review this company problem using the provided public sources.
Check the evidence package for missing items and inconsistent fields.
Generate risk flags and follow-up questions without making final judgments.
